releaseBoundary: The v0.1 pilot is English-first. German and French are planned readiness languages, not shipped localizations.

languages.name: English
languages.scope: Pilot UI, help, error, support, and release-note copy.

languages.name: German
languages.scope: Requires translated app/package UI strings, Swiss finance/tax glossary review, and layout checks before availability can be claimed.

languages.name: French
languages.scope: Requires translated app/package UI strings, Swiss finance/tax glossary review, and layout checks before availability can be claimed.

requiredGlossaryTerms.note: Used wherever an export or return package exists but has not been submitted.
Used for the default privacy/runtime mode.
Used for missing document or support states.
Used for support exports that omit raw finance/source data.
Used for tax years or VAT periods that reject ledger/tax mutations.
